use criterion::{black_box, criterion_group, criterion_main, Criterion};

fn serialize_batch(items: &[Request]) -> Vec<u8> {
    serde_json::to_vec(items).unwrap()
}

#[derive(serde::Serialize)]
struct Request {
    id: u64,
    payload: String,
}

fn bench_serialize_batch(c: &mut Criterion) {
    // GOOD: realistic payload size matching production batch sizes
    let items: Vec<Request> = (0..500)
        .map(|i| Request {
            id: i,
            payload: format!("realistic_payload_data_for_item_{i}_with_more_content"),
        })
        .collect();

    c.bench_function("serialize_batch_500", |b| {
        b.iter(|| serialize_batch(black_box(&items)))
    });
}

criterion_group!(benches, bench_serialize_batch);
criterion_main!(benches);
